name: Cartier Destinée Solitaire, 0.30ct
material: Platinum, Brilliant-Cut Diamonds (central stone 0.30ct + pavé halo)
description: A brilliant-cut diamond surrounded by a halo of smaller diamonds, creating a luminous, floating effect. The band is also pavé-set.

name: Cartier Destinée Solitaire, 0.50ct
material: Platinum, Brilliant-Cut Diamonds (central stone 0.50ct + pavé halo)
description: The larger Destinée with its generous half-carat centre stone amplified by the surrounding pavé diamond halo.

name: Solitaire 1895, 0.30ct
description: A knife-edge platinum band rising to cradle a single brilliant-cut diamond. The 1895 setting defined the modern engagement ring.

name: Solitaire 1895, 0.50ct
description: The half-carat version of Cartier's timeless solitaire design — clean lines, four prongs, maximum brilliance.

name: Baiser Volé Eau de Parfum, 100ml
description: A 'stolen kiss' captured in lily — green, delicate, and utterly elegant. Created by Mathilde Laurent for Cartier in 2011.

name: Baiser Volé Parfum, 100ml
description: The intensified parfum concentration, deepening the lily accord with powdery, musky richness.

name: Déclaration Eau de Toilette, 100ml
description: A bold, spicy-woody fragrance for men. Caraway and birch lead into a cedar and vetiver dry-down. Created in 1998 by Jean-Claude Ellena.

name: Déclaration Parfum, 100ml
description: The intensified version with deeper amberwood and musk, amplifying the original's confident character.

name: La Panthère Eau de Parfum, 75ml
description: A chypre-floral fragrance evoking a sensual, feline aura. Gardenia meets musk in a velvety, captivating scent created by perfumer Mathilde Laurent.

name: La Panthère Eau de Toilette, 75ml
description: A lighter, fresher interpretation with luminous gardenia at its heart — strong yet captivating.

name: Must de Cartier Eau de Toilette, 100ml
description: The original 1981 fragrance — an oriental composition of galbanum, rose, and vanilla that defined an era. Relaunched as a modern classic.

name: Must de Cartier Gold Eau de Parfum, 100ml
description: A richer, more opulent version with deepened amber and jasmine notes — warm, glowing, luxurious.

name: Pasha de Cartier Edition Noire Eau de Toilette, 100ml
description: A darker, smokier take on Pasha — chili pepper and dark woods add intensity to the original's foundation.

name: Pasha de Cartier Parfum, 100ml
description: An oriental-woody fragrance blending sandalwood, patchouli, and ambergris. The ultimate expression of masculine sophistication.

name: Rivières de Cartier — Insouciance, 100ml
description: A carefree scent of white flowers and ginger blossom, capturing the lightness of a river breeze.

name: Rivières de Cartier — Luxuriance, 100ml
description: A lush green eau de toilette evoking tropical foliage after rain. Fig leaf, tuberose, and vetiver in a fresh, verdant composition.

name: Santos de Cartier Eau de Toilette, 100ml
description: A fresh, aromatic fragrance inspired by the spirit of aviation pioneer Alberto Santos-Dumont. Lavender, cardamom, and leather.

name: Santos de Cartier Parfum, 100ml
description: The intensified parfum with deeper oud and iris absolute notes, grounding the original's airy freshness.

name: Entrelacés de Cartier Tea Cup and Saucer
description: A refined tea cup and saucer set featuring Cartier's signature intertwined design in hand-finished porcelain.

name: Panthère de Cartier Mug
description: Fine porcelain mug adorned with the iconic Cartier panther motif in gold.

name: Clash de Cartier Ring, Agate
description: Studded with green agate, this ring contrasts smooth stone with the tactile geometry of the Clash motif.

name: Clash de Cartier Ring, Onyx
description: The signature beads and studs design combined with sleek onyx, embodying Cartier's spirit of duality — classic yet rebellious.

name: Juste un Clou Bracelet, Classic Model
description: Aldo Cipullo's 1971 design transforms a simple nail into a statement of bold, urban elegance. The bracelet wraps around the wrist, its head and tip meeting in a striking motif.

name: Juste un Clou Bracelet, Small Model
description: A slimmer, everyday version of the nail bracelet, retaining the subversive spirit of the original in a more delicate form.

name: Juste un Clou Ring, Classic Model
description: The full-size Juste un Clou ring, a bold statement piece where the nail head and point are clearly visible.

name: Juste un Clou Ring, Small Model
description: The nail motif wrapped elegantly around the finger — clean, radical, and uncompromising lines that redefine everyday objects as luxury.

name: LOVE Bracelet, Classic Model
description: The iconic LOVE bracelet, featuring a bold, clean design with visible screw motifs. Created in New York in 1969, it fastens with a special screwdriver — a symbol of commitment.

name: LOVE Bracelet, Small Model, 6 Diamonds
description: A slimmer interpretation of the LOVE bracelet, set with six diamonds for added sparkle while maintaining the collection's signature screw motif design.

name: LOVE Ring, Classic Model
description: The classic LOVE ring featuring the collection's signature screw motifs engraved around the band. A timeless symbol of love and commitment.

name: LOVE Ring, Small Model, 1 Diamond
description: A refined, slimmer version of the LOVE ring accented with a single diamond, blending elegance with the bold spirit of the collection.

name: Panthère de Cartier Ring, Small Model
description: The panther comes alive in sculpted gold with emerald-green tsavorite eyes and an onyx nose — fierce and iconic.

name: Panthère de Cartier Ring, Small Model
description: The same striking panther motif reimagined in warm rose gold, with green tsavorite eyes piercing from the sculpted form.

name: Trinity Bracelet
material: 18K White Gold, Yellow Gold, Rose Gold
description: The classic Trinity bracelet with three intertwined bands representing love, fidelity, and friendship. An enduring Cartier icon since 1924.

name: Trinity Bracelet on Chain
material: 18K White Gold, Yellow Gold, Rose Gold
description: An elegant variation featuring the Trinity rings suspended on a fine gold chain, offering a more delicate interpretation of this celebrated design.

name: Trinity Ring, Classic Model
material: 18K White Gold, Yellow Gold, Rose Gold
description: Three interlocking bands in three shades of gold — a design conceived by Louis Cartier in 1924 and beloved by Jean Cocteau.

name: Trinity Ring, Small Model
material: 18K White Gold, Yellow Gold, Rose Gold
description: A slimmer, more understated version of the Trinity ring, maintaining the three intertwined bands in a lighter everyday silhouette.

name: Baignoire Watch, Mini Model
description: A miniature jewel-like version of the Baignoire, its tiny oval face paired with a refined leather strap.

name: Baignoire Watch, Small Model
description: The elongated oval — or 'bathtub' — case designed in 1912, representing Cartier's most feminine and unconventional watch shape.

name: Ballon de Cartier Watch, 33mm
description: The round case with its distinctive off-center crown protected by a sapphire cabochon. Named after the Montgolfier hot-air balloon, launched in 2007.

name: Ballon de Cartier Watch, 36mm
description: A two-tone interpretation of the Ballon bleu, blending warm rose gold with polished steel for everyday elegance.

name: Panthère de Cartier Watch, Mini Model
description: The Art Deco-inspired square case and chain-link bracelet in polished steel — accessible luxury with unmistakable Cartier DNA.

name: Panthère de Cartier Watch, Small Model
description: The Panthère watch, first created in 1983, with its supple, fluid bracelet of flat gold links that drapes like a second skin.

name: Santos de Cartier Watch, Small Model
description: Created in 1904 for aviator Alberto Santos-Dumont — the first modern wristwatch. Features the QuickSwitch interchangeable metal and leather strap system.

name: Santos de Cartier Watch, Small Model
description: The all-steel Santos with its signature exposed screws on the bezel. Includes interchangeable straps for versatile everyday wear.

name: Tank Louis Cartier Watch, Large Model
description: The definitive Tank in generous proportions, housing an automatic movement beneath the clean, architectural lines that have graced the wrists of style icons for over a century.

name: Tank Louis Cartier Watch, Mini Model
description: Louis Cartier's 1917 masterpiece in its most delicate form. The rectangular case with elongated flanks — inspired by the aerial view of a Renault tank — defines modern watch design.

name: Duomètre Chronograph
description: The Dual-Wing concept — two independent mechanisms share a single case. One powers the time display, the other the chronograph, each with its own barrel, gear train, and balance. A groundbreaking architecture unique to JLC.

name: Duomètre Quantième Lunaire
description: The Dual-Wing movement drives a moon-phase display of extraordinary precision — accurate to one day in 1,111 years. Power reserve indicators for each mechanism sit on opposite sides of the dial.

name: Master Control Calendar Stainless Steel
description: A triple calendar with day, date, and month displays plus moon phase, housed in a 40mm steel case. The blue sunray-brushed dial adds contemporary appeal to a classic complication.

name: Master Control Date Stainless Steel
description: The Master Control Date embodies JLC's 1,000 Hours Control quality standard. A clean, sector-dial design with date at 6 o'clock — the quintessential Swiss dress watch with manufacture movement.

name: Master Grande Tradition Calibre 946
description: A multi-axis tourbillon with a celestial vault — the orbital flying tourbillon completes a full rotation in 24 hours while displaying a sidereal sky chart. Among the most complex watches JLC has ever made.

name: Master Grande Tradition Calibre 950
description: A minute repeater with a flying tourbillon — the gongs produce cathedral-tone chimes while the tourbillon rotates in its cage. A masterwork of acoustic and mechanical engineering from the Vallée de Joux.

name: Master Ultra Thin Moon Steel
description: An elegant 39mm dress watch with a moon phase display — one of JLC's most popular complications. The eggshell dial, dauphine hands, and slim profile make it a refined everyday timepiece.

name: Master Ultra Thin Perpetual Calendar Pink Gold
description: A perpetual calendar in an impossibly thin case — day, date, month, moon phase, and year, all powered by JLC's ultra-slim automatic calibre. High horology in an understated package.

name: Polaris Chronograph Stainless Steel
description: A sporty chronograph inspired by the 1968 Memovox Polaris diver. The inner rotating bezel, 100m water resistance, and chronograph function make it JLC's most versatile sports watch.

name: Polaris Geographic Stainless Steel
description: A true GMT/world-time watch with a 24-city ring and day/night indicator for the second timezone. The Polaris case design with its crown-guard shoulders adds a robust, adventurous character.

name: Rendez-Vous Classic Night & Day
description: A feminine timepiece with a sun/moon day-night indicator at 6 o'clock. The floral numeral at the hour of your choosing marks a special moment — a personal rendez-vous on the dial.

name: Rendez-Vous Dazzling Night & Day
description: The haute joaillerie interpretation — snow-set diamonds cascade across the dial and bezel, with a day/night indicator adding poetic complication to the dazzling gem-setting.

name: Reverso Classic Monoface Origin
description: The purest expression of the Reverso — the Art Deco icon born in 1931 to survive polo matches. A clean dial with no complications, the swivelling case reveals a solid caseback ready for personalisation.

name: Reverso Tribute Small Seconds
description: A dressy Reverso in warm pink gold with a sunray-brushed silver dial and small seconds at 6 o'clock. The hand-wound calibre is visible through a sapphire caseback.
